{{Fig|[[References]] are kept in a dedicated [[Glossary:Registry|registry]] while their individual text fields (e.g. <span class{{=}}"reference">#Title</span>, <span class{{=}}"reference">#Author</span>, <span class{{=}}"reference">#Date</span>, <span class{{=}}"reference">#Source</span>, etc.) are stored in the text registry, and thus are available for global text searches. In the picture, reference [[Glossary:Registry|registry]] holds 71,791 members. Those highlighted in <span style{{=}}"padding: 3px; background: yellow;">yellow</span> are [[References#Image references|references of downloaded images]]. The remaining references describe imported articles. The selected Quantum Biology reference describes and article imported from [http://www.nature.com/nphys/index.html Nature Physics] in Feb 2013. The element list panel (bottom-right) displays [[Glossary:Topic|topic]]s generated from that article. All those [[Glossary:Topic|topic]]s share the same reference.}}
